name: HVAC Premium Onboarding
description: Premium tier onboarding: Jotform webhook → parse → Supabase insert → prompt builder → Retell create flow + agent → publish

parameters.name: subject
parameters.value: Your AI Receptionist is Ready — {{ $('Extract Agent ID').first().json.company_name }}

parameters.name: html
parameters.value:
=

Welcome to Syntharra Premium!

Your AI Receptionist for {{ $('Extract Agent ID').first().json.company_name }} is now live and ready to take calls.

Your agent has full booking capability and will book appointments directly into your {{ $('Extract Agent ID').first().json.extractedData.calendar_platform || 'calendar' }}.

If you have any questions, reply to this email.

— Syntharra AI Solutions

nodes.name: Send Welcome Email
nodes.notes: Replace with SES node once email migration is complete. Uses same pattern as standard onboarding welcome email.
